dev.jeka.core.api.text

Class Jk2ColumnsText

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.text.Jk2ColumnsText

  • public class Jk2ColumnsText
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class that allows formatting text into two columns. Each column consists of a left and right section separated by a delimiter.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.util.List<dev.jeka.core.api.text.Jk2ColumnsText.Row> rows 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Jk2ColumnsText add(java.lang.String left, java.lang.Object right)
      Adds a new row with the given left and right values.
      static Jk2ColumnsText of(int leftSize, int maxSize)
      Creates a new instance of Jk2ColumnsText with the given left size and maximum size.
      static Jk2ColumnsText of(int leftSize, int maxSize, java.lang.String delimiter)
      Creates a new instance of Jk2ColumnsText with the given parameters.
      Jk2ColumnsText setAdjustLeft(boolean adjustLeft)
      Sets the adjustLeft flag.
      Jk2ColumnsText setMarginLeft(java.lang.String marginLeft)
      Sets the left margin for displaying the whole result;
      java.lang.String toString() 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • rows

        public final java.util.List<dev.jeka.core.api.text.Jk2ColumnsText.Row> rows

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static Jk2ColumnsText of(int leftSize,
                                int maxSize,
                                java.lang.String delimiter)
        Creates a new instance of Jk2ColumnsText with the given parameters.
        Parameters:
        leftSize - the size of the left column
        maxSize - the maximum overall size of each row in the text
        delimiter - the delimiter used to separate the columns

      • of

        public static Jk2ColumnsText of(int leftSize,
                                int maxSize)
        Creates a new instance of Jk2ColumnsText with the given left size and maximum size. Uses the delimiter " : ".
        See Also:
        of(int, int, String)

      • add

        public Jk2ColumnsText add(java.lang.String left,
                          java.lang.Object right)
        Adds a new row with the given left and right values.

      • setAdjustLeft

        public Jk2ColumnsText setAdjustLeft(boolean adjustLeft)
        Sets the adjustLeft flag. When set to true, the left column will adjust its size to accommodate longer left values. When set to false, the left column will be truncated to the specified size.

        Initial value is true

      • setMarginLeft

        public Jk2ColumnsText setMarginLeft(java.lang.String marginLeft)
        Sets the left margin for displaying the whole result;
        Parameters:
        marginLeft - the left margin to set
        Returns:
        the modified Jk2ColumnsText object

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
